scripts.build: tsc && cp -r src/data dist/src/data || cp -r data dist/data || true
scripts.postbuild: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const possibleSrc = ['src/data/database.json', 'data/database.json', 'database.json']; const possibleDest = ['dist/src/data', 'dist/data', 'dist']; for (const src of possibleSrc) { if (fs.existsSync(src)) { console.log('Found DB at:', src); for (const dest of possibleDest) { try { if (!fs.existsSync(dest)) fs.mkdirSync(dest, {recursive:true}); fs.copyFileSync(src, path.join(dest, 'database.json')); console.log('Copied to:', dest); } catch(e) {} } break; } }"
